note: Alias for shape — both route to AddShape (with --prop formula → AddEquation). Common text/position/size/font props inlined below; full surface (geometry, rotation, effects, …) in pptx/shape.json. effective.* keys behave as documented in pptx/shape.json.

text.readback: plain text content of the textbox

font.description: font family. Bare 'font' targets Latin + EastAsian; for per-script control (Japanese / Korean / Arabic) use font.latin, font.ea, or font.cs.

font.ea.description: East-Asian font slot (a:ea) — Chinese / Japanese / Korean text.

font.cs.description: Complex-script font slot (a:cs) — Arabic / Hebrew / Thai etc.

direction.description: paragraph reading direction (a:pPr rtl). Use 'rtl' for Arabic / Hebrew layouts.

size.description: font size — Add/Set forwards to the first run; Get exposes the inheritance-resolved value as effective.size, not bare size.
size.readback: n/a at shape level — read effective.size on the shape, or size on the inner run

bold.description: Add/Set forwards to the first run; Get does not surface bold at the shape level.
bold.readback: n/a at shape level — read bold on the inner run

italic.description: Add/Set forwards to the first run; Get does not surface italic at the shape level.
italic.readback: n/a at shape level — read italic on the inner run

color.description: text color — Add/Set forwards to the first run; Get exposes the inheritance-resolved value as effective.color, not bare color.
color.readback: n/a at shape level — read effective.color on the shape, or color on the inner run

align.readback: one of: left | center | right | justify

effective.direction.description: resolved reading direction inherited from placeholder→layout→master→presentation defaults. Suppressed when 'direction' is set directly on the textbox.

effective.size.description: resolved font size inherited from placeholder→layout→master→presentation defaults. Suppressed when 'size' is set directly on the textbox.

effective.font.description: resolved font name inherited from placeholder→layout→master→presentation defaults. Suppressed when 'font' is set directly on the textbox.

effective.color.description: resolved text color inherited from placeholder→layout→master→presentation defaults. Suppressed when 'color' is set directly on the textbox.

effective.bold.description: resolved bold inherited from placeholder→layout→master→presentation defaults. Suppressed when 'bold' is set directly on the textbox.

autoFit.description: auto-fit mode for the textbox text body. Alias: autofit.

valign.description: text vertical anchoring inside the textbox (a:bodyPr anchor). 'middle' is an input alias for 'center' — Get always reads back 'center'.

margin.description: text body insets (a:bodyPr lIns/tIns/rIns/bIns). Single value applies to all four sides; CSS-style 4-value form is 'lIns,tIns,rIns,bIns'. '0' / '0cm' is a valid round-trip and is preserved (not collapsed to default).
margin.readback: single length (e.g. "0.25cm") when all four sides match, otherwise comma-separated 4-tuple

id.description: OOXML shape id; source of the @id in the stable path /shape[@id=ID].

zorder.description: 1-based z-order in slide shape tree. On add/set, repositions the shape within the shape tree (1 = back).

name.description: Override the auto-generated 'TextBox {N}' label on cNvPr @name.

lang.description: BCP-47 language tag on first run rPr (drawingML rPr/@lang).
